sentences.arabic: يُشَارِكُ الشَّبَابُ فِي حَمَلَاتٍ تَطَوُّعِيَّةٍ لِتَنْظِيفِ الشَّوَارِعِ وَالْحَدَائِقِ.
sentences.translation: Mladi učestvuju u volonterskim akcijama čišćenja ulica i parkova.
sentences.translationEn: Young people participate in volunteer campaigns to clean streets and parks.

sentences.arabic: تَهْدِفُ هَذِهِ الْمُبَادَرَاتُ إِلَى تَحْسِينِ مَظْهَرِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove inicijative imaju za cilj poboljšanje izgleda grada.
sentences.translationEn: These initiatives aim to improve the city's appearance.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الطُّلَّابُ أَهَمِّيَّةَ الْعَمَلِ الْجَمَاعِيِّ وَخِدْمَةِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici uče o važnosti timskog rada i služenja zajednici.
sentences.translationEn: Students learn the importance of teamwork and community service.

sentences.arabic: تُشَجِّعُ الْمَدَارِسُ الْجَمِيعَ عَلَى الْمُشَارَكَةِ فِي هَذِهِ الْأَنْشِطَةِ.
sentences.translation: Škole podstiču sve da učestvuju u ovim aktivnostima.
sentences.translationEn: Schools encourage everyone to participate in these activities.
